title.en: Fitzpatrick Scale — Types I–VI Skin Phototypes

subtitle.en: Thomas Fitzpatrick (1975) classified six skin phototypes by UV sunburn vs tan response — the clinical standard for sunscreen recommendation
subtitle.ko: Fitzpatrick(1975)는 UV 일광 화상 vs tan 반응으로 6 phototype — 자외선 차단제 임상 기준

description.en: Six skin swatches I-VI with burn/tan profiles. Toggle type to highlight; row of swatches shows full scale.
description.ko: 6 피부 swatch I-VI + burn/tan 프로파일. 타입 토글로 강조; 전체 척도 표시.
